summary: Iteration 75 - Film Pipeline Multi-Select Testing: ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend API accepts subgenres array (max 3) and locations array. Frontend shows subgenre badges (clickable, max 3 selectable), location category filters (Tutti, Studi, Citta, Natura, Storici), and multi-select locations with green border. Marketplace page loads with empty state. Navigation shows 'Produci!' and 'Mercato' correctly.

backend_api_tests.genres_endpoint: PASS - Returns genres with subgenres list
backend_api_tests.locations_endpoint: PASS - Returns 83 locations with categories (studios, cities, nature, historical)
backend_api_tests.film_pipeline_counts: PASS - Returns max_simultaneous and total_active counts
backend_api_tests.create_film_with_arrays: PASS - Accepts subgenres array and locations array
backend_api_tests.marketplace_endpoint: PASS - Returns films list (empty in this case)

frontend_ui_tests.step1_genre_select: PASS - Genre dropdown with data-testid='genre-select' works
frontend_ui_tests.step1_subgenre_badges: PASS - 6 subgenre badges appear after genre selection (Horror)
frontend_ui_tests.step1_subgenre_max_3: PASS - Counter shows '3/3 selezionati' when 3 selected
frontend_ui_tests.step1_avanti_button: PASS - Disabled until title + genre + subgenre selected, then enables
frontend_ui_tests.step2_pre_screenplay: PASS - Textarea accepts input, validates 100+ chars
frontend_ui_tests.step3_category_filters: PASS - 5 filters found: loc-filter-all, loc-filter-studios, loc-filter-cities, loc-filter-nature, loc-filter-historical
frontend_ui_tests.step3_filter_switching: PASS - Clicking filters changes displayed locations
frontend_ui_tests.step3_multi_select: PASS - Can select multiple locations (green border indicates selection)
frontend_ui_tests.step3_location_counter: PASS - Shows '2 location selezionate' when 2 selected
frontend_ui_tests.step3_submit_button: PASS - 'Proponi Film (1 CP)' enabled when locations selected

marketplace_tests.page_loads: PASS - Marketplace page loads with title 'MERCATO FILM'
marketplace_tests.search_input: PASS - Search input with data-testid='marketplace-search' present
marketplace_tests.refresh_button: PASS - Refresh button with data-testid='marketplace-refresh' present
marketplace_tests.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'IL MERCATO È VUOTO' empty state

navigation_tests.produci_in_navbar: PASS - 'Produci!' visible in top navigation bar
navigation_tests.mercato_in_navbar: PASS - 'Mercato' visible in top navigation bar

critical_code_review_comments: FilmPipeline.jsx: Subgenre badges correctly implemented with data-testid='subgenre-{name}' and max 3 selection limit (lines 127-136)
FilmPipeline.jsx: Location category filters use data-testid='loc-filter-{category}' pattern (lines 188-195)
FilmPipeline.jsx: Location buttons use data-testid='loc-{name-with-dashes}' and show green border when selected (lines 200-208)
film_pipeline.py: FilmProposalRequest model accepts subgenres: List[str] and locations: List[str] (lines 18-23)
film_pipeline.py: calculate_pre_imdb() provides bonus for multi-subgenre (+0.3) and multi-location (+0.2 per extra location) (lines 109-141)
Navigation correctly shows 'Produci!' with Clapperboard icon and 'Mercato' with Store icon (App.js lines 268-269)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All multi-select features verified: Subgenres now use clickable badges (max 3), locations use category-grouped multi-select with filters (Tutti/Studi/Citta/Natura/Storici). Backend accepts arrays for both fields. Marketplace page at /marketplace loads correctly with empty state. Navigation shows 'Produci!' and 'Mercato'. Backend test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_film_pipeline_iter75.py for regression testing.
verified_features: Subgenres changed from single-select dropdown to clickable badges (max 3)
'Avanti' button in Step 1 disabled until title, genre, and at least 1 subgenre selected
Location category filters: Tutti, Studi, Citta, Natura, Storici
Location multi-select with green border for selected items
Location selection counter shows 'X location selezionate'
'Proponi Film' button disabled until at least 1 location selected
Backend API /film-pipeline/create accepts subgenres array and locations array
Marketplace page (/marketplace) loads correctly and displays empty state
Navigation shows 'Produci!' and 'Mercato' correctly in navbar
